title: Senior Software Engineer - Netmeds Holdings Services - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Netmeds Holdings Services - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Netmeds Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Netmeds Holdings Services:
Netmeds Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds Holdings Services!
